subcategory: celestial particle orb with canvas animation
use_cases: Landing page hero section for tech and SaaS products seeking an immersive visual presence
Product showcase pages requiring animated visual backdrops to capture user attention
Portfolio or creative agency sites needing celestial-themed visual effects
Homepage sections for digital products requiring modern, animated hero elements
ai_summary: A dark-themed hero component featuring an animated canvas with orbiting celestial particles. The component creates a visually striking orb effect with particles that glow and orbit around a central point, responding to mouse position. Ideal for SaaS landing pages, tech products, and creative portfolios that require an immersive animated background to establish visual hierarchy and capture user engagement.
